title: Google Sign-In - Verify flow when user cancels the Google Sign-In process
description: Tests the behavior when the user initiates Google Sign-In but cancels it from the system dialog.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 2. When the Google Sign-In system dialog appears, tap the cancel button or outside the dialog to dismiss it.

expected_result: The Google Sign-In dialog is dismissed, and the user remains on the STAGE app's Login screen.
